PROJECT_CONTEXT.md.purpose: High-level repo map and durable project context.
skip_when: A narrow file-level pass already has scope and registry context

README.md.purpose: Human setup and runbook entry point.

docs/widget_cleanup_todo.md.purpose: Short human-readable widget cleanup status pointer.
read_when: User asks what is next in widget cleanup
Need current pending queue in prose form
skip_when: Use backlog.json for machine-readable current state
Use archived history only for old detailed findings

docs/widget_catalog.md.purpose: Widget inventory and feature ownership map.
read_when: Auditing a specific feature's widget surface
Checking whether a primitive already exists
skip_when: Only process rules are needed; use rules.json instead

docs/controller_patterns.md.purpose: Current controller and view-model boundary rules.
read_when: Moving business logic out of widgets

docs/sliver_layout_guide.md.purpose: Sliver-native layout guide and Catch-specific scroll contracts.
read_when: Changing CustomScrollView, SliverList, SliverPersistentHeader, or NestedScrollView surfaces
skip_when: No scroll/sliver behavior is involved; use SLIVER-001 summary instead

read_when: Need historical provider inventory or architecture rationale
skip_when: Current controller rules are enough; prefer controller_patterns.md

docs/error-handling-audit.md.purpose: Error handling architecture snapshot and remediation map.
read_when: Changing exceptions, error mapping, logging, or user-facing error rendering

docs/firestore_functions_data_contract_t.purpose: Firestore rules, Cloud Functions boundaries, schema drift, and data-contract tracker.

read_when: Changing domain models used by Functions
User asks about quality rating or compensation-bar assessment
skip_when: Current verification has not been refreshed

docs/audit_registry/README.md.purpose: Recursive audit workflow, registry files, pruning policy, and completion criteria.
skip_when: Task is a trivial one-off command
